title: Patch partitioning strategy for planner knowledge
decision_to_make: Should planner-safe knowledge be version-partitioned primarily by patch family, by time window, or by a hybrid model?
why_it_matters: Mechanics can stay historically true while becoming unsafe for current planning after a patch.

title: Publication threshold for planner-safe knowledge
decision_to_make: What confidence threshold or evidence pattern is sufficient before a mechanic can be published into planner-safe knowledge?
why_it_matters: The repository currently has confidence bands, but not a final publication gate.

title: Body-linkage representation policy
decision_to_make: How should the system represent outcomes when public evidence confirms facility existence but not exact orbital or body linkage?
why_it_matters: Identity and body assignment can remain partly unresolved in public-only workflows.

title: Human review surface for contradictions and identity collisions
decision_to_make: What is the best human-facing review surface for contradiction cases, identity collisions, and correction workflows?
why_it_matters: The repository already accumulates contradiction and anomaly objects that future tooling will need to review safely.

title: Analyst-side workflow for image-backed evidence before production screenshot ingestion
decision_to_make: What is the canonical analyst workflow for attaching screenshots and image-backed evidence while production OCR and screenshot ingestion remain unbuilt?
why_it_matters: High-value evidence is already arriving in screenshots, but the repository still lacks a final operating workflow.
